step_by_step_thinking: Good clinical practice is observed in all phases of clinical trials except **preclinical**. Therefore, the correct option is \boxed{A}. During the preclinical phase, animals or cells are tested to understand how a substance works, what kind of impact it might have, etc., without involving human subjects. Although important for ensuring safety and understanding mechanism of action, good clinical practices specifically refer to standards applied during human trials to protect participant welfare and maintain integrity in assessing drug efficacy.
raw_response:
Good clinical practice is observed in all phases of clinical trials except **preclinical**. Therefore, the correct option is \boxed{A}. During the preclinical phase, animals or cells are tested to understand how a substance works, what kind of impact it might have, etc., without involving human subjects. Although important for ensuring safety and understanding mechanism of action, good clinical practices specifically refer to standards applied during human trials to protect participant welfare and maintain integrity in assessing drug efficacy.
\boxed{A}
